title: Tech Specialist / Signature Device / Superior Tech contextual modification UI

summary.feature: Adds contextual modification workflows outside progression for Workbench, Garage, Shipyard, and lightsabers while keeping Superior Tech category selection in progression.
changedFileFormatNotes: data/tech-specialist-traits.json is JSONL: one trait record per line.
packs/feats.db remains JSONL: one feat per line.

userDirectionApplied: Tech Specialist execution belongs in Workbench, Shipyard, and Garage rather than the progression engine.
Lightsabers count as weapons for Tech Specialist, Signature Device, and Superior Tech where applicable.
During lightsaber construction, Tech Specialist grants an extra hilt/accessory slot.
The modification modal shows radio button, modification name, description, and calculated cost.
Cost uses canonical/system item cost first, then parsed item description cost, then minimum 1000 credits for Tech Specialist or 2000 credits for Superior Tech.
Superior Tech still requires an immediate progression choice from Armor, Weapons, Droids, Vehicles, or Devices and can be taken repeatedly only for remaining categories.

dataAuthority: data/tech-specialist-traits.json contains 39 Tech Specialist / Superior Tech trait records.
progression: Superior Tech keeps an immediate tech_category choice in feat metadata.
FeatChoiceResolver filters Superior Tech category options so already-selected categories are not offered again.
ui: Item customization workbench displays a Tech Specialist panel for eligible armor, weapons, gear/devices, and lightsabers.
Garage and Shipyard customization bay displays a Tech Specialist panel for droids and vehicles.
Modification modal groups Tech Specialist and Superior Tech traits separately and shows each row as radio button, name, description, and cost.
execution: On confirmation, credits are deducted through TransactionEngine before the Mechanics result is resolved.
A failed Mechanics check still spends the credits and does not apply the trait.
A successful check records the trait on the item/asset and applies high-confidence system updates where safe.
Signature Device can designate one item/asset, allows Take 10 on modification checks for that item, and permits a second trait at DC 30.
Changing Signature Device prompts for confirmation and removes signature-only benefits from the former item without refund.
Signature items with two traits can toggle the active trait.
lightsabers: Lightsabers use the weapon trait list.
Lightsaber construction receives one additional hilt/accessory slot when the builder has Tech Specialist.

limitations: Some trait effects are stored as flags/metadata if the current item/actor schema does not have a reliable native field.
Downtime/time reduction from assistants remains GM/table adjudication.
Full runtime testing in Foundry is still required.
validation: packs/feats.db parsed as JSONL with 419 rows
data/tech-specialist-traits.json parsed as JSONL with 39 rows
